survivors.joint_topic: Genome-Inspired Modular Routing for Mixture-of-Experts Body Plans
survivors.mechanism: The router regulates which expert modules activate per token, and we treat these activation patterns as developmental switches: distinct module-activation combinations induce distinct specialized subnetworks, so one shared parameter set produces many task-specific architectures depending on which modules switch on.
survivors.primary_quote: a single genome induces many distinct body plans depending on which modules switch on

notes: At least one candidate passed all four gates. drop_counts = first gate each candidate failed; gate_fired_counts = every gate that dropped a candidate (so Gate 2 quarantine is credited even when Gate 1 also failed).
